## Sovereignty Test

Check each box only if it is fully true:

- [ ] **No account** — core features work without sign-up, login, or activation
- [ ] **No server** — core function runs entirely on-device; any sync is optional and user-controlled or E2EE
- [ ] **No subscription** — free or pay-once; nothing expires
- [ ] **Readable data** — local storage in an open/documented format, or first-class export
- [ ] **Survives the vendor** — the installed app keeps working if the project disappears today
